**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Wuxi Auto-link World Information Technology Co., Ltd. (formerly Beijing Auto-link) is a leading tier-1 supplier in the intelligent cockpit domain. The company executed a strategic relocation from Beijing to Wuxi, a move often associated with seeking better integration into the Yangtze River Delta's automotive supply chain and leveraging local government support for IoV (Internet of Vehicles). With a registered capital of nearly 30M RMB and a 'Medium' enterprise size (300+ insured employees), AutoLink has evolved from a software service provider to a comprehensive intelligent manufacturing entity, producing smart cockpit controllers and vehicle-road collaboration systems.
